subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Ancient Lord unto him who hath turned towards Him, that the fragrances of utterance might draw him unto a horizon luminous with lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک القدم لمن اقبل الیه لتجذبه نفحات البیان الی افق کان بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
